skills.name: Pyeonjeon
skills.description: Fires a long-range Pyeonjeon after loading it.
skills.effect_text:
Maximum Casting Time 2 seconds (Fixed)
Maximum Range 400
AoE Attack Ratio SkillSR
Skill Factor SkillFactor % x 2 times
Final Damage +5%, Range +20 per 0.1 seconds of casting

skills.name: Black Horn Bow
skills.description: Every target with [Vestige] debuff applied by yourself receives instant damage the moment skill is cast.

skills.name: White Horn Bow
skills.description: Every target with [Vestige] debuff applied by yourself receives instant damage the moment skill is cast.

skills.name: Outbrave
skills.description: Install Outbrave Flag in front. The installed flag points to the direction the character was looking at when casting the skill.
skills.effect_text:
Consumes all [Unbending Spirit] buff
Range: 150
Duration: [Consumed Unbending Spirit stacks * 5] seconds
Skill Factor of Supporting Arrow: CaptionRatio % of Pyeonjeon x 4 times
Number of Targets: CaptionRatio2

skills.name: Brotherhood
skills.effect_text:
Range 150
Damage increases by CaptionRatio % per 1 [Unbending Spirit] buff
3% Damage is added per one other party member within the range

skills.name: Dancing Arrow
skills.description: Scatters arrow on the ground and performs dancing with arrows.
skills.effect_text:
Channeling Time: 2 seconds
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 2 times
Final Damage of the Third Arrow increases by 100%
AoE Attack Ratio SkillSR

attributes.name: Hwarang: Prostration
attributes.description: * Increases Accuracy by 4% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.description: * Increases the skill factor by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: Pyeonjeon: Moving Aim
attributes.description:
* Can move while facing the front with a fixed Movement Speed of 20 after 0.7 seconds of Pyeonjeon casting

* Increases SP consumption by 20%

attributes.name: Pyeonjeon: Majority Specialized
attributes.description:
* Cooldown changes to 5 seconds

* Target knocked down when accurately hit after 2 seconds casting

* Remove 2 removable buff applied on the target

* Damage dealt by Pyeonjeon ignores enemy's Evasion

* Black Horn Bow and White Horn Bow cast within 3 seconds of Pyeonjeon's accurate hit ignores enemy's Evasion

attributes.name: Dancing Arrow: Leap
attributes.description:
* Increases SP consumption by 50%

* Cast Leap of current level 2 seconds after channeling

attributes.name: [Arts] Outbrave: Fight to Death
attributes.description:
* Fire Supporting Arrow to the front when the party members including yourself casts attack skills to the direction the flag is pointing within the range

* Skill Factor of Supporting Arrow is halved

* Supporting Arrow Cooldown : 5 seconds (Applied per character)

* Fight to Death effect cannot be stacked in party

attributes.name: [Arts] Sky Striking Grenade
attributes.description:
* Final Damage of Black Horn Bow and White Horn Bow decreases by 75%

* When casting Black, White Horn Bow, unguided projectiles are fired at the target location and deals AoE damage at 40 range around the target

* AoE Attack Ratio of Black, White Horn Bow changed to 5

* Flight speed of Black and White Bow projectiles decreases
